deliveries.commentary: angled in on a length on off. Comes in with the arm, having drifted in, and Kishan defends
back of a length just outside off. A bit of shape away and Farhan covers it well, defending it right under his eyes
shorter on middle and leg. Comes off slow and Kishan, having taken a step down the track, tugs it towards deep mid wicket
shorter outside off. Farhan takes a step down the track before tapping it towards mid wicket
back of a length outside off. Farhan rises with the bounce and jabs it towards cover point

goes straight up the chimney, and Farhan falls for a duck! Dug in short outside off and Farhan, after three dot balls, feels the pinch to get one away. Has a wild swipe at it but he has to fetch it from too far out. Right off the toe-end and Rinku, stationed at mid on, makes no mistake. India on the board very early!
off the top edge and beyond the ropes! Back of a length just outside leg. Ayub tries to help it over fine leg and gets a fat top edge that clears deep third instead!

massive, massive appeal, and the finger goes up! Bumrah has a beaming smile on his face, but Ayub wants to take another look! Devilish in-swinging yorker, starting on middle and then swerving in. Ayub seems to fall across and then plays all around it. The bat is nowhere near the ball as it kisses the front pad first. Ball Tracking comes up now and...the ball is thundering into middle and off. Pakistan rocked again, and Ayub has to walk back. And he takes a review along with him too!
slower ball into the track outside off. Kishan waits for it before hoicking it towards deep square leg
back of a length outside off. Moves away and Babar chases after it. Slashes it over backward point and Rinku, from deep third, tears across to save two
back of a length outside off. Shapes away late and Babar, despite getting squared up a touch, runs it down to deep third
Salman off the mark too! Big in-ducker but it is too full outside off. Salman has a stab at it and muscles it off the inside half of the bat past mid wicket!
length ball outside off. Babar has an airy waft at it and edges it down to deep third
oh! Zinged in full on middle and off. Kishan comes down the track and then plays all around it. Off the pad into the off side
pushed in on a length on middle and off. Usman comes forward and prods it into the off side
skewed up but safe! Speared in full on the pads. Kishan looks for the sweep but the ball pings off the top edge, just clearing short third over his right shoulder
oh dear! Back of a length just outside off. Usman charges down the track and then shanks it agriculturally towards mid wicket
Usman counter-punches! Looks like Pakistan are going to keep coming hard at India. This is on a length outside off and Usman pumps it over mid off!
back of a length just outside off. Usman wants to tip and run to backward point but Babar is not very interested
slow, short and wide outside off. No room to work with at all and Kishan scuffs it terribly into the off side
angled in on a length on off. Usman presses half forward and nudges it towards mid wicket
short again but punished this time! More into the body on middle and leg, and more into the arc. Kishan uses the angle and swings it away over square leg!
full and slanting down leg. Babar seems to miss it and the umpire decides to indulge in some exercise
given a bit of air on a back of a length outside off. Cut hard but straight to cover point
Kishan welcomes the new bowler with a massive maximum! Fizzed into the slot on the pads, and Kishan climbs into it. He gets down on one knee and wallops it behind square!
fired in on a length on middle and off, from around the wicket. Patted into the off side
slower and perhaps fuller just outside leg. Kishan looks for the sweep and misses, with the ball rolling off his leg towards the keeper
over the top again! A little slower and fuller on leg stump. Usman gives himself ample room and carves it over cover point!
back of a length on off, and this nips back in. Kishan does well to get his bat out of the way and dab it down to short third
this is excellent batting! Fullish on middle and leg. Usman steps out to the leg side, goes through the line and crashes it over extra cover!
slow and short outside off. Kishan goes back and punches it to long off
zipped in on a length on middle and off. No room to work with and Usman prods it into the off side
fired in fuller on off. Tilak brings out the reverse and scuffs it into the cover region. Good for him he got some sort of bat on it
slower on a length just outside off. Usman gives himself room and chips it enough to long off's left to return for a brace
slowed up on a length on off. Kishan stays back and jams it into the off side
fuller outside off. Usman gets a good stride in and drives it towards long off
smart, smart batting! Fired in on a back of a length outside off. Kishan waits on it, uses the pace and glides it superbly to short third's right!
pushed in on a length on off. Shadab shuffles across, gets down on one knee and paddles it towards fine leg
smashed again! And Kishan brings up a thrilling half-century off 27 balls! Floated up fuller just outside off. Into Kishan's arc and he bulldozes it over the bowler's head!
flighted up fuller on middle and leg. Usman plays it back to the bowler
shot of the night so far! This is full and very floaty. Not much venom behind this and Kishan goes through the line to blitz it over extra cover!
Usman continues to fight! Fullish on leg stump. Usman charges down the track and heaves it over mid wicket!
full ball outside leg. Kishan gets down on one knee and swipes it towards deep backward square leg. Faheem fumbles a touch and Kishan dashes back for the second
length on off. Shadab gives himself room and then punches it through the vast real estate in the cover point region. Has enough time to get back for three
this is another mighty hit! Phew - that made some sound off the bat! Tossed up into the slot on middle and leg. Kishan bends his back knee and clatters it over deep mid wicket!
googly on a length outside off. Usman drops it into the off side and calls his partner through
the runs keep on flowing, and Kishan is making this his playground! On a length and down leg. Kishan brings out the sweep and smacks it over short fine leg!
clever batting! Loopy full toss outside off. Shadab pre-meditates the reverse but watches it till the very end, gliding it fine of short third!
shortish outside off. Grips, spins and bounces extra. Kishan taken aback by it and he pulls it towards deep mid wicket

tough, tough chance but it goes down! Fullish on off. Usman skips down the track and lifts it over the bowler's head. Tilak, stood wide at long off initially, makes up ground and stretches out to his right at the end but the ball grazes his fingers and runs away!
back of a length on middle and leg. Tilak half-sweeps it towards deep backward square leg
back to back boundaries! Fullish and targeting the stumps. Usman dances down the track and bangs it over the bowler's head!
that is a shot and a half! Shortish on middle and off, and this takes a couple of business days to arrive. Kishan waits, unleashes the reverse and thumps it over backward point!
pulls the length back on middle stump after seeing the batter advance. Usman adjusts and pats it into the off side
flighted up full on middle and off. SKY comes forward and pokes it towards extra cover
flighted up full outside off. Usman gets forward and drives it to long off
very full on middle and off. Driven down the ground to long off
googly on a back of a length outside off. Shadab stays back and punches it to long off
back of a length outside off. Tilak hangs back before punching it towards deep point
flighted up full just outside off. Usman has a wild hack across the line and drags it towards deep backward square leg
greeted with a boundary! Half-tracker on middle and off. SKY waits on it and then pounds it between long on and deep mid wicket!
back of a length on middle and leg. Cramped for room on the cut, Usman scuffs it into the off side
the pause is here. On a back of a length outside off. SKY hangs back and jabs it towards sweeper cover
slower and fuller on leg stump. Usman backs away and hoicks it over the bowler's head. Mopped up comfortably by long on
flighted up full on middle and leg. Tilak lunges forward and turns it towards mid wicket
shortish and following the batter outside leg. Shadab works it towards deep mid wicket
gorgeous. Just gorgeous! Floated up full and wide outside off. Tilak gets his hands through the ball and creams it over extra cover!
googly on a back of a length outside off. Shadab reads it off the pitch and punches it towards sweeper cover
back of a length just outside off and this spins back in a mile. Tilak plays all around it and he gets pinged on the pad
thrashed into the fence! Loopy full toss just outside off. Nawaz gets down on one knee and razes it just behind square on the leg side!
fired in on a length just outside off. Tilak presses half forward and pushes it towards point
back of a length on middle and off. Comes in and Nawaz reads it off the surface. Plays it back to the bowler eventually
back of a length on middle and leg. SKY turns it towards deep mid wicket
seems like a googly, on a back of a length just outside off. SKY throws his hands at it and cracks it past extra cover. Good work on the fence to keep it to three

another skier, and another catch for Dube! Pakistan crumbling! Fullish outside off and Shadab's eyes light up. He thinks he can smash this into the ocean but slices across it way too much. A tame shank and Dube settles under it at long off to hand Tilak a wicket off his first ball!
darted in full outside off, delivered again with a pause. Driven down the ground to long off
fired in full outside off. Shaheen drives it down the ground to long off
shorter and quicker outside off. SKY winds up and hacks it towards long on
very full outside off. Faheem digs it out towards extra cover
flighted up full just outside off. SKY gets down on one knee and swipes it towards deep backward square leg. Good stop by Shadab
length on middle and off. Faheem goes right back and works it into the square leg region
back of a length on off. SKY looks to punch it through the on side but ends up jamming it off the inside edge into his pads, with the ball then rolling towards the bowler
googly on a length on middle and leg. Shaheen gets caught on the crease and plays all around it, with the ball trickling off the pad behind square
back of a length on middle and leg. SKY gets a half stride in before jabbing it towards extra cover
fizzed through full but this is just a shade down leg. Faheem does not lay bat on ball, and the umpire calls it a wide
back of a length outside off. SKY hangs back and chops it behind point for a quick single
back of a length just outside off. Shaheen plays it back to the bowler

pinged on the back leg, and on your way, says umpire Richard Illingworth! And Tilak does not bother with the review either! Zipped in full on middle stump. Tilak looks to tonk it into tomorrow via a slog sweep but misses it completely as the ball comes in with the arm. Seemed straight enough and Tilak, after a chat with his skipper, agrees. Pakistan strike after the drinks break!
slowed up on a length outside off. Shaheen has an ungainly mow at it and the ball floats off the toe-end towards short third

goes a mile up, and Hardik bites the dust! Ayub goes back-to-back, and the Pakistan supporters in Khettarama find their voice! Ayub dangles the carrot on a length outside off and Hardik cannot resist the temptation to have a nibble at it. Loses his shape completely because he has to reach out and slices across it too. Babar circles under it at long off and does the rest. Pakistan inching their way back here!
short outside off. Faheem hops back and thunders it towards long off
given a bit of air on a full length just outside off. Dube winds up on the sweep and drags it towards deep backward square leg
googly on a full length on middle and leg. Shaheen gets down on one knee and slugs it down the ground to long on
tossed up full on middle and leg. SKY stretches forward and flicks it towards deep mid wicket
on a length on middle and off. Faheem winds up and drags it between deep mid wicket and deep square leg for a brace
fullish outside off. Dube gets onto the front foot and knocks it to long on

straight off the toe-end, and Rinku was never going to drop that! Darted in on a back of a length on middle and off. Faheem chances his arm but comes up second-best. Comfortably too. Clinks it and Rinku, well inside the deep mid wicket fence, sends Faheem on his way!
round-arm delivery, on a back of a length outside off. Dube hangs back and hacks it towards long on
welcomed with a thump past extra cover! Half-tracker outside off. Shaheen backs away and hammers it past extra cover!
bowled with a very long pause. Googly on a back of a length on off and SKY, cramped for room, cuts it straight to backward point
darted in on a length on leg. Shaheen swings and chunks it of the inside edge into his pad
catch it is the cry, but it falls well short! Zinged in full outside off. SKY looks for the square sweep but clinks it off the toe-end. Rolls to deep mid wicket eventually
four more! Fullish on middle and off. Shaheen gets down on one knee and hoicks it past short fine leg!
sensational timing! Marginally short on off. SKY picks the ball coming in, stands up tall and caresses it off the back foot between long on and deep mid wicket!
short ball, attempting to follow the batter outside leg. Too short, though, and Shaheen ducks under it. Gets the wide too
fired in quicker and fuller on the pads. SKY tucks it towards deep mid wicket
shortish and down leg. Shaheen, having backed away, swings like a rusty gate. Seems like the ball has grazed the bat or the glove, but Kishan shells it!
shortish outside off. Dube opens up his stance and heaves it on the bounce to deep mid wicket

Kuldeep drops a catch now! Banged half-way down and the ball sits up. Shaheen gives himself lots of room and smears it towards wide long on, where Kuldeep tries to take it near his left shoulder and ends up parrying it over the fence!
almost a chop-on! Slowed up on a back of a length outside off. Dube tries to smash it through cover and nearly drags it onto his stumps
that has been dispatched with disdain! Very round-arm and hung up on a length wide outside off. Dube marches down the track and pumps it over the bowler's head!
in-coming ball, on a back of a length on off. Spins in, cramps Dube on the pull and he swishes at thin air. Off the pad and towards short fine leg
leg-cutter, on a fullish length just outside off. Delivered with a pause, meaning SKY has to hold his charge to the off side. Swipes at it and misses, getting pinged on the pad

SKY waits, and waits, and then finds deep mid wicket! Tossed up on a length on middle and off. SKY looks for the slog sweep but has no pace to work with. Gets under it well but does not muster the requisite power. Ayub, stood a few yards inside the fence, does the rest, and SKY departs after a scratchy knock!
very long pause again. Fired in on a length on middle and off. Rinku has an almighty mow across the line and chalks it off the toe-end towards the bowler
back of a length outside off. Abhishek tries to force the issue through the off side but can only pick out cover point
jaffa! Back of a length in the channel and this shapes away very late. Salman gets turned inside out and is beaten

clothed straight to mid on, and the captain does the trick first up! Oh my - what a decision by the Pakistan skipper! Darted in on a back of a length on middle and leg. Skids on and gets a little big on Abhishek. He has a hack at it but all he musters is a tame chip to Shaheen. Back-to-back ducks in T20 World Cup cricket for Abhishek, and Pakistan on the move early!
back of a length, honing into middle and leg. Salman presses half forward ans pushes it towards mid wicket. A wicket-maiden to start off from Hardik!
edged and this rolls away into the fence too! Fullish in the fifth stump channel and this moves away late. Tilak has a tentative poke at it and the ball bobbles past wide slip!

another terrible slog, and Pakistan are falling like a pack of cards now! Back of a length just outside off. Salman tries to pick this up and dump this over mid wicket but the shape is all wrong. The ball does a bit off the surface, in terms of stopping and extra bounce, and mid on cannot believe the offering that has come his way. Pakistan in all sorts of trouble!
back of a length on the stumps. Tilak tips it into the short mid wicket region and scampers across to the other end
shortish just outside off and this flies through. Not sure what Usman was thinking but he has a short-arm-tug at it in the end. Ball whistles past his flailing blade
slower ball on a back of a length outside off. Usman goes back and across before cutting it towards backward point. Top stop by Axar to his left
back of a length just outside off. Babar gets up on his toes and drops it into the point region
ouch! Another half-tracker outside off. Kishan winds up and thunders it into his partner at the other end. That will...sting
zipped into the blockhole on leg stump. Usman nearly falls over but manages to dig it out towards fine leg. that was bowled at 145.2kph

big off-spinner, on a back of a length outside off. Kishan swats it to mid on and scampers across. Has to sprawl but could be in trouble with Shaheen hitting the stumps. Nothing doing, says the third umpire, and Kishan stays!
slower ball on a length outside off. Babar comes forward and punches it on the up towards extra cover
back of a length outside off and this skips through. Babar throws the lot at it but only grabs a handful of fresh air
short, wide and punished! This sits up and Kishan has all the time in the world to rock back and pummel it through cover!
back of a length on the stumps. Usman stays back and turns it into the mid wicket region
looped up full on middle and off. Kishan takes a step down the track before chunking it off the inside edge into the on side

hot knife through butter, and Babar is outta here! Darted in on a fullish length just outside off. Babar has a massive slog at it and gets nowhere close to the ball, which also comes in with the arm. Axar has his arms aloft in celebration, and Pakistan have been dealt a body blow!
floated up full just outside off. Tilak comes forward and defends calmly

big lbw shout, but that is sliding down! Flighted up full on middle and leg. Shadab plonks his front foot and plays outside the line. Gets done on the inside and rapped on the pad, but the angle was taking it down leg

just over Shaheen! Kishan would have had his heart in his mouth for a moment there. Shortish on middle and off. Skids through and Kishan, like Abhishek, cloths it. But he gets enough on it to get it beyond the tall fast bowler at mid on!
googly on a length just outside off. Shadab lunges forward and knocks it to long on
shortens the length and throws it out wide after seeing Kishan advance. He adjusts and pokes it into the off side
shortish just outside off. Usman stays leg side of the ball but cannot cut it past backward point

edged again, and four again! Flighted up nicely on a full length on middle and off. Drifts in and then straightens just a shade, by virtue of being an off-spinner. Nafay, on as a sub, tears after it from short third. He puts in a dive too but it is in vain!
back of a length outside off and this kicks up a little. Usman splices his punch into the off side
back of a length outside off. Kishan hangs deep in his crease and dabs it towards short third
shortish on off. Usman gives himself room but cannot pierce the ring. Cut straight to backward point
length on leg stump and this spins back in sharply. Kishan, tucked up for room, plonks it towards mid wicket
a bit more air on this and a bit of extra bounce. On a back of a length outside off and Usman dabs it towards backward point
shorter on off. Kishan uses the depth of the crease and pulls it towards deep mid wicket
four more! Back of a length delivery sliding into the pads. Usman gets inside the line, uses the pace and glances it fine past the keeper!
fuller on middle and off. Kishan skips down the track and clinks it back past the bowler. Long on cuts it off but not before Kishan bags a brace
length just outside off. Shadab lunges forward and nurdles it into the extra cover region
fizzed in full on leg stump. Kishan unfurls the reverse and even though he ends up on the deck, he swipes it past short third. Back for another brace
shortish outside off. Usman waits on it and runs it down to short third
shoritsh on leg stump. Kishan hops back and tugs it between deep mid wicket and deep backward square leg. Settles for a single this time
incoming ball, on a back of a length on middle and leg. Comes in to cramp the batter further and Shadab prods it back to the bowler

does him with a ripper, and Kishan's party is over! This has plenty of revs on it, pitching on a length on leg stump. Kishan backs away, perhaps trying to force it through the off side. The ball spins appreciably, sticks in the surface and Kishan is too early into the stroke. Swishes at thin air and the stumps have been rattled. Big, big wicket this for Pakistan, but take nothing away from a splendid tone-setting knock!
back of a length on the stumps. Usman goes back and turns it into the mid wicket region
tossed up outside off and this is the one that goes away. SKY reaches out for it and pushes it towards sweeper cover
tossed up on a length on off. Comes in with the arm and Shadab, pressing forward, defends
fizzed in again, on a length on middle and leg. Straightens off the pitch and Tilak defends off the back foot
slanted in on a length on the pads. Shadab plays all around it and the ball jams him on the pad
slanted in on a length on middle and off. Comes in with the arm and SKY prods it towards extra cover
peach! Googly on a length on off. Shadab does not pick it and goes feeling for it, only to see the ball fizz past the outside edge
tossed up on a length on middle and off. SKY presses half forward before nudging it into the point region
length on middle and leg. Shadab shuffles across his stumps and punches it to long on
tossed up again, full outside off. Tilak comes forward and taps it gently towards extra cover
googly on a shortish length outside off. Usman reaches out for it and cuts it uppishly towards sweeper cover
delivered with a pause again, on a fullish outside off. Tilak comes forward and defends

stumped by a mile, and Axar has two! This is very shrewd bowling. Axar pre-empts the charge and pulls the length back just outside off. Usman steps out nevertheless and is nowhere close to the pitch of the ball. Swishes at it in hope and misses, with Kishan whipping off the bails.UltraEdge says that there was a nick too. Either way, Pakistan five down!
delivered with an incredibly long pause. On a length outside off and this just holds its line. Tilak goes feeling for it and is beaten on the outside
zinged in on a length on off. Goes on with the arm and Nawaz, nibbling at it, is beaten on the outside
another pause, and another shortish ball on off. Tilak shovels it towards deep square leg
fired in full on middle and leg. Nawaz comes forward and blocks. Another tidy spell by Axar

another high ball, and India are catching almost everything now! This is slow again and perhaps ends up as a low full toss just outside off. Nawaz tries to shovel it away but the shot lacks the power to clear the fence. Dube, stationed somewhere between deep mid wicket and deep square, moves a little to his right and pouches it. Pakistan on the brink!
lobbed up full outside off. Tilak comes forward and knocks it to long off
back of a length just outside off. Faheem hangs back and stabs it into the off side

has that scraped the pad?! Nawaz and Pakistan plead, but the ump says no! Pakistan go upstairs! Kumar Dharmasena took a long look at it but was unmoved. Fullish on leg stump and this straightens just a shade. SKY shapes for the sweep and misses, with the ball kissing the back leg. Did it pitch in line? Ball Tracking says it did. Impact is also in line, but the ball is just clipping leg stump. Umpire's Call, and SKY stays!
leg-spinner, floated up on middle and off. Faheem stretches forward and pokes it towards extra cover
long pause and a more round-arm action this time. Hung up full and wide, and Tilak punches it to long off
shot! Floated up full outside off. Faheem plants his front foot, gets his hands through the ball and lashes it over extra cover!
speared in full but also down leg. SKY misses it and the umpire has no qualms in calling it a wide
into the blockhole outside off. Faheem tries to hit this too hard and jams it off the inside edge into his pads
very round-arm, on a back of a length on off. Not a great deal of bounce and SKY chops it towards backward point
back of a length just outside off. Faheem goes back and knocks it to long off
back of a length outside off. Tilak gets forward, opens his bat face and steers it behind point for a couple of runs. 10 off the over, and India have nullified Tariq's threat so far

oh dear - that is very sloppy! Slowed up on a fullish length just outside off. SKY sweeps it towards deep backward square leg but Shadab cannot quite account for the spin enough. The ball hits his hands and then slips through his fingers and into the fence!
length outside off. Faheem sits deep in his crease before dabbing it towards backward point
full on middle and leg. SKY skips down the track and flicks it towards deep mid wicket
googly on a back of a length on middle and leg. Faheem hops back and tugs it towards deep mid wicket
back of a length on middle and leg. Tilak stays back and stabs it towards mid wicket
leg-spinner on a back of a length on middle. Keeps a tad low and Shaheen bunts it enough to the bowler's left for a single

an absolute peach, but Dube seems to have somehow survived this! Goodness gracious me! But we are going upstairs for something! Carnage in Colombo! Floated up beautifully on a full length on middle stump. Drifts in and then rags away sharply. Dube goes searching for it and has no clue about it. Beaten all ends up but UltraEdge says there is no bat involved. Nothing doing on the stumping too, and Ayub misses a hat-trick by a whisker. Another coat of paint, and the stumps would have been rattled too. Wow.

goes straight up, and goes straight down! Zipped in full on middle and off. Holds in the surface and straightens. Shaheen swipes across the line and miscues it. Tilak runs back, gets both hands to it but cannot hold on
back of a length on the stumps. Dube stays back and defends
back of a length on middle and leg. Shaheen heaves it towards deep backward square leg
flighted up full on the pads. Dube pats it gently into the mid wicket region and gets off the mark
pushed in on a length on off. Faheem stays back and punches it to the bowler's left. Tilak chases after it and ensures it is a dot
on a back of a length outside off and this stops in the surface. SKY jabs it out towards sweeper cover

plumb with a capital P, and Abrar is outta here too! Googly on a back of a length just outside off. Abrar has no clue about it nd gets caught on the crease. The ball jams him on the pad right in front and not sure if he is going to be saved by the review here. No bat involved. Ball Tracking comes up and it says the ball is missing off. And leg stump. Because it is crashing into middle. Chakravarthy on a hat-trick!

right in the gap, and Dube has his first boundary! Not sure deep backward square leg picked that off the bat. Half-tracker on off and Dube smears it between deep mid wicket and deep backward square leg!

thumped on the pad, but that was sliding down, perhaps! Incoming ball on a length on middle and off. Cuts back in and Tariq, trying to play some French cricket, misses it. No chance of bat being involved but Ball Tracking, as expected, shows the ball to be sneaking down leg.
fired in very full outside off. Dube digs it out to extra cover and saunters across to the other end
back of a length outside off and Tariq watches this go through to the keeper. Tariq did not move a muscle there
back of a length outside off. Comes in with the arm and Dube tugs it towards deep mid wicket
floated up fuller outside off. Shaheen backs away and swings at it with all his might. Only connects with the fresh Colombo air
well well! This is very short outside off and does not bounce a great deal. SKY shuffles across, swishes and misses. Not called a wide, despite being beyond the tramlines due to SKY's movement
back of a length outside off. Shaheen winds up and drags it towards long on
into the blockhole on middle and off. SKY jams it out to long on and keeps strike
fired in full outside off. Shaheen gives himself a bit of room before hacking it down to long on
